name: NMP Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I Overview. We are a blank check exempted company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on December 18, 2024, as a Cayman Islands exempted company with limited liability, formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities.
